unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione
We are seeking a highly skilled individual to expertly handle, process and/or forward client calls and partner enquiries, in German, French, Italian and English, on various topics related to cards payment, in accordance with our work instructions.

## Mansioni
- Answer incoming calls and handling inquiries from customers and business partners in German, French, Italian and English
- Receive and process client complaints and issues related to credit, prepaid and debit cards
- Ensure timely and satisfactory resolution of client concerns to enhance client satisfaction and loyalty
- Ensure all customer interactions and processes comply with internal quality standards and legal regulations
- Proactively find solutions for client complaints and escalating complex cases to the appropriate department
- Identify sales opportunities (selling and upselling) during interactions with the customers

## Cosa offriamo
- Flexibility in working from home and the management of working hours in order to guarantee a healthy work-life balance
- Numerous benefits and incentives
- Well-being, motivational and team-building activities

## Requisiti
- Commercial or tourism background
- Experience in customer service
- Good knowledge of Office package/ PC use
- Good communication skills
- Languages: Italian, German/Swiss German, French and English
- As the first point of contact with customers, the following soft skills are needed: courtesy, empathy, customer orientation and ability to work in team
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

unchangedJobs.title: IT Card Management Analyst / Specialist

titleByLocale.it: Analista IT per la Gestione delle Carte
titleByLocale.fr: Analyste IT en Gestion des Cartes

unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione

The candidate will join the IT Card Management Centre of Excellence, with cross-functional responsibilities for credit and debit card management systems. The systems operate on cloud-native architectures in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and support key payment processes in a highly regulated banking environment. The role involves actively contributing to functional and technical analysis activities, supporting the evolution of application solutions and integration with core banking, payment circuits and external platforms.

## Mansioni

### Functional and Process Analysis

- Analyse and understand Card Management processes: card issuance, lifecycle management, authorisations, clearing & settlement, fraud and chargebacks.
- Collect, analyse and formalise business requirements, translating them into functional and technical specifications.
- Support the business in defining IT solutions consistent with the bank's operational, regulatory and compliance models.
- Collaborate with internal stakeholders (Operations, Compliance, Risk, Security).

### Technical and IT Analysis

- Draft functional and technical documentation (application specifications, integration flows, data mapping).
- Support the design and evolution of microservice architectures in a cloud environment.
- Collaborate with internal and external development teams during the development, testing and release phases.
- Support the analysis and management of application incidents and production issues.

### DevOps and Technologies

- Operate in a DevOps environment, actively collaborating with development teams.
- Support and understand continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipelines, using automation tools (e.g. Jenkins).
- Use code versioning systems (Git, Bitbucket) for application configuration management.
- Provide support in application and infrastructure troubleshooting in cloud-native and distributed environments.
- Contribute to the stability, quality and scalability of solutions, collaborating on monitoring, logging and performance issues.
- Have a basic knowledge of Java and event-driven microservice architectures.

## Requisiti

### Must Have

- Experience in functional and technical analysis in IT.
- Knowledge of credit and debit card payment systems.
- Ability to understand and analyse complex and distributed application architectures.
- Experience, even non-specialist, in cloud environments, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate.

### Basic knowledge of:

- DevOps models and CI/CD pipelines
- Git / GitHub
- Microservice architectures
- Kafka or messaging / event streaming systems
- Change Data Capture
- PostgreSQL (PGSQL)
- Java
- Monitoring and logging tools (e.g. Splunk, Dynatrace)

### Nice to Have

- Experience in banking or financial contexts.
- Knowledge of major payment circuits (e.g. Visa, Mastercard).
- Familiarity with GCP services supporting cloud-native architectures (containers, logging, monitoring).
- Knowledge of application security and compliance issues (e.g. PCI DSS, data protection).
- Basic knowledge of Kubernetes and oauth2 application authorisation standards

## Soft Skills

- Strong analytical approach and solution orientation.
- Ability to operate in complex and regulated environments.
- Aptitude for working in multidisciplinary teams.
- Ability to communicate effectively with technical and business stakeholders.
- Proactivity and focus on continuous improvement.

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Il candidato si unirà al Centro di Eccellenza per la Gestione delle Carte IT, con responsabilità cross‑funzionali per i sistemi di gestione di carte di credito e di debito. I sistemi operano su architetture cloud‑native in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) e supportano processi di pagamento chiave in un ambiente bancario altamente regolamentato. Il ruolo prevede di contribuire attivamente alle attività di analisi funzionale e tecnica, supportando l’evoluzione delle soluzioni applicative e l’integrazione con il core banking, i circuiti di pagamento e le piattaforme esterne. ## Mansioni ### Analisi Funzionale e di Processo - Analizzare e comprendere i processi di Gestione delle Carte: emissione, gestione del ciclo di vita, autorizzazioni, compensazione e liquidazione, frodi e chargeback. - Raccogliere, analizzare e formalizzare i requisiti di business, traducendoli in specifiche funzionali e tecniche. - Supportare il business nella definizione di soluzioni IT coerenti con i modelli operativi, normativi e di compliance della banca. - Collaborare con le parti interessate interne (Operations, Compliance, Risk, Security). ### Analisi Tecnica e IT - Redigere documentazione funzionale e tecnica (specifiche applicative, flussi di integrazione, mappatura dati). - Supportare la progettazione e l’evoluzione di architetture microservizi in un ambiente cloud. - Collaborare con team di sviluppo interni ed esterni durante le fasi di sviluppo, test e rilascio. - Supportare l’analisi e la gestione degli incidenti applicativi e dei problemi di produzione. ### DevOps e Tecnologie - Operare in un ambiente DevOps, collaborando attivamente con i team di sviluppo. - Supportare e comprendere i pipeline CI/CD, utilizzando strumenti di automazione (es. Jenkins). - Utilizzare sistemi di versioning del codice (Git, Bitbucket) per la gestione della configurazione applicativa. - Fornire supporto nel troubleshooting di applicazioni e infrastrutture in ambienti cloud‑native e distribuiti. - Contribuire alla stabilità, qualità e scalabilità delle soluzioni, collaborando su monitoraggio, logging e problemi di performance. - Avere una conoscenza di base di Java e delle architetture microservizi orientate agli eventi. ## Requisiti ### Must Have - Esperienza in analisi funzionale e tecnica in IT. - Conoscenza dei sistemi di pagamento con carte di credito e di debito. - Capacità di comprendere e analizzare architetture applicative complesse e distribuite. - Esperienza, anche non specializzata, in ambienti cloud, preferibilmente Google Cloud Platform (GCP). - Residenza in Ticino o disponibilità a trasferirsi. ### Conoscenza di base di: - Modelli DevOps e pipeline CI/CD - Git / GitHub - Architetture microservizi - Kafka o sistemi di messaggistica / streaming di eventi - Change Data Capture - PostgreSQL (PGSQL) - Java - Strumenti di monitoraggio e logging (es. Splunk, Dynatrace) ### Nice to Have - Esperienza in contesti bancari o finanziari. - Conoscenza dei principali circuiti di pagamento (es. Visa, Mastercard). - Familiarità con i servizi GCP che supportano architetture cloud‑native (container, logging, monitoraggio). - Conoscenza delle questioni di sicurezza applicativa e di compliance (es. PCI DSS, protezione dei dati). - Conoscenza di base di Kubernetes e standard di autorizzazione delle applicazioni oauth2 ## Soft Skills - Forte approccio analitico e orientamento alla soluzione. - Capacità di operare in ambienti complessi e regolamentati. - Aptitudine al lavoro in team multidisciplinari. - Capacità di comunicare efficacemente con stakeholder tecnici e di business. - Proattività e focus sul miglioramento continuo.

descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Der Kandidat wird dem IT Card Management Centre of Excellence beitreten, mit funktionsübergreifenden Verantwortlichkeiten für Kredit- und Debitkartenmanagementsysteme. Die Systeme laufen auf cloud‑native Architekturen in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) und unterstützen Schlüsselzahlungsprozesse in einer stark regulierten Banken­umgebung. Die Rolle umfasst die aktive Mitwirkung an funktionalen und technischen Analyseaktivitäten, die Unterstützung der Weiterentwicklung von Anwendungslösungen und deren Integration mit Core Banking, Zahlungskreisen und externen Plattformen. ## Aufgaben ### Funktionale und Prozessanalyse - Analyse und Verständnis der Card‑Management‑Prozesse: Kartenausgabe, Lebenszyklusmanagement, Autorisierungen, Clearing & Settlement, Betrug und Chargebacks. - Sammeln, Analysieren und Formalisieren von Geschäftsanforderungen, Übersetzen in funktionale und technische Spezifikationen. - Unterstützung des Geschäfts bei der Definition von IT‑Lösungen, die mit den betrieblichen, regulatorischen und Compliance-Modellen der Bank übereinstimmen. - Zusammenarbeit mit internen Stakeholdern (Operations, Compliance, Risk, Security). ### Technische und IT‑Analyse - Erstellung von funktionaler und technischer Dokumentation (Anwendungsspezifikationen, Integrationsflüsse, Datenabbildung). - Unterstützung bei der Gestaltung und Weiterentwicklung von Microservice‑Architekturen in einer Cloud‑Umgebung. - Zusammenarbeit mit internen und externen Entwicklungsteams während der Entwicklungs-, Test- und Freigabephasen. - Unterstützung bei der Analyse und Verwaltung von Anwendungsvorfällen und Produktionsproblemen. ### DevOps und Technologien - Betrieb in einer DevOps‑Umgebung, aktive Zusammenarbeit mit Entwicklungsteams. - Unterstützung und Verständnis von CI/CD‑Pipelines, Einsatz von Automatisierungstools (z. B. Jenkins). - Nutzung von Code‑Versionierungssystemen (Git, Bitbucket) zur Konfigurationsverwaltung von Anwendungen. - Bereitstellung von Support bei der Fehlerbehebung von Anwendungen und Infrastrukturen in cloud‑native und verteilten Umgebungen. - Beitrag zur Stabilität, Qualität und Skalierbarkeit von Lösungen, Zusammenarbeit bei Monitoring, Logging und Leistungsproblemen. - Grundkenntnisse in Java und ereignisgesteuerten Microservice‑Architekturen. ## Anforderungen ### Muss haben - Erfahrung in funktionaler und technischer Analyse im IT‑Bereich. - Kenntnisse der Kredit- und Debitkarten‑Zahlungssysteme. - Fähigkeit, komplexe und verteilte Anwendungsarchitekturen zu verstehen und zu analysieren. - Erfahrung, auch nicht spezialisiert, in Cloud‑Umgebungen, vorzugsweise Google Cloud Platform (GCP). - Wohnsitz in Tessin oder Bereitschaft zum Umzug. ### Grundkenntnisse von: - DevOps‑Modelle und CI/CD‑Pipelines - Git / GitHub - Microservice‑Architekturen - Kafka oder Messaging / Event‑Streaming‑Systeme - Change Data Capture - PostgreSQL (PGSQL) - Java - Monitoring‑ und Logging‑Tools (z. B. Splunk, Dynatrace) ### Nice to Have - Erfahrung in Banken‑ oder Finanzkontexten. - Kenntnisse der wichtigsten Zahlungskreise (z. B. Visa, Mastercard). - Vertrautheit mit GCP‑Diensten, die cloud‑native Architekturen unterstützen (Container, Logging, Monitoring). - Kenntnisse von Anwendungs­sicherheits- und Compliance‑Fragen (z. B. PCI DSS, Datenschutz). - Grundkenntnisse von Kubernetes und OAuth2‑Anwendungs­autorisierungsstandards ## Soft Skills - Starker analytischer Ansatz und lösungsorientierte Denkweise. - Fähigkeit, in komplexen und regulierten Umgebungen zu arbeiten. - Eignung für die Arbeit in multidisziplinären Teams. - Fähigkeit, effektiv mit technischen und geschäftlichen Stakeholdern zu kommunizieren. - Proaktivität und Fokus auf kontinuierliche Verbesserung.
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Le candidat rejoindra le Centre d'Excellence en Gestion des Cartes IT, avec des responsabilités transversales pour les systèmes de gestion de cartes de crédit et de débit. Les systèmes fonctionnent sur des architectures cloud‑native dans Google Cloud Platform (GCP) et prennent en charge les processus de paiement clés dans un environnement bancaire hautement réglementé. Le rôle implique de contribuer activement aux activités d'analyse fonctionnelle et technique, de soutenir l'évolution des solutions applicatives et l'intégration avec le core banking, les circuits de paiement et les plateformes externes. ## Missions ### Analyse fonctionnelle et de processus - Analyser et comprendre les processus de Gestion des Cartes : émission, gestion du cycle de vie, autorisations, compensation et règlement, fraude et rétrofacturations. - Collecter, analyser et formaliser les exigences métier, les traduire en spécifications fonctionnelles et techniques. - Soutenir le métier dans la définition de solutions IT cohérentes avec les modèles opérationnels, réglementaires et de conformité de la banque. - Collaborer avec les parties prenantes internes (Operations, Compliance, Risk, Security). ### Analyse technique et IT - Rédiger la documentation fonctionnelle et technique (spécifications applicatives, flux d'intégration, cartographie des données). - Soutenir la conception et l'évolution des architectures microservices dans un environnement cloud. - Collaborer avec les équipes de développement internes et externes pendant les phases de développement, de test et de mise en production. - Soutenir l'analyse et la gestion des incidents applicatifs et des problèmes de production. ### DevOps et technologies - Opérer dans un environnement DevOps, collaborer activement avec les équipes de développement. - Soutenir et comprendre les pipelines CI/CD, utiliser des outils d'automatisation (ex. Jenkins). - Utiliser les systèmes de versionnage de code (Git, Bitbucket) pour la gestion de la configuration applicative. - Fournir un support dans le dépannage d'applications et d'infrastructures dans des environnements cloud‑native et distribués. - Contribuer à la stabilité, à la qualité et à l'évolutivité des solutions, collaborer sur le monitoring, le logging et les problèmes de performance. - Avoir une connaissance de base de Java et des architectures microservices orientées événements. ## Exigences ### Must Have - Expérience en analyse fonctionnelle et technique IT. - Connaissance des systèmes de paiement par carte de crédit et de débit. - Capacité à comprendre et analyser des architectures applicatives complexes et distribuées. - Expérience, même non spécialisée, dans les environnements cloud, de préférence Google Cloud Platform (GCP). - Résident en Tessin ou disposé à déménager. ### Connaissances de base de : - Modèles DevOps et pipelines CI/CD - Git / GitHub - Architectures microservices - Kafka ou systèmes de messagerie / streaming d'événements - Change Data Capture - PostgreSQL (PGSQL) - Java - Outils de monitoring et de logging (ex. Splunk, Dynatrace) ### Nice to Have - Expérience dans des contextes bancaires ou financiers. - Connaissance des principaux circuits de paiement (ex. Visa, Mastercard). - Familiarité avec les services GCP qui soutiennent les architectures cloud‑native (conteneurs, logging, monitoring). - Connaissance des questions de sécurité applicative et de conformité (ex. PCI DSS, protection des données). - Connaissance de base de Kubernetes et des normes d'autorisation d'applications oauth2 ## Soft Skills - Forte approche analytique et orientation vers la solution. - Capacité à opérer dans des environnements complexes et réglementés. - Aptitude au travail en équipes multidisciplinaires. - Capacité à communiquer efficacement avec les parties prenantes techniques et métier. - Proactivité et focus sur l'amélioration continue.

unchangedJobs.description:
## Apprendistato:
- Apprendistato:

## Destinatari
- Studenti brillanti che hanno terminato le scuole medie e si apprestano ad entrare nel mondo del lavoro. Ottengono il diploma al termine di una formazione duale che comprende una rotazione tra gli uffici orientata a fornire loro le necessarie conoscenze del settore.

## Durata
- 4 anni (informatica)

## Programma scolastico
- Programma scolastico apprendistato informatico sviluppo applicazioni / gestione infrastrutture / sviluppo business digitale

## Formazione scolastica
- Formazione scolastica: profilo esteso con maturità integrata, presso il Centro Professionale Tecnico a Locarno.

## Corsi interaziendali

unchangedJobs.title: Collaboratore Servizi Logistici - Ufficio Tecnico
unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione
Siamo alla ricerca di un/una Collaboratore/Collaboratrice Servizi Logistici – Ufficio Tecnico per rafforzare il nostro team. In questo ruolo sarai responsabile del coordinamento e della pianificazione delle attività di manutenzione e riparazione degli edifici e degli impianti tecnici, garantendo operazioni efficienti e un servizio di alta qualità per i nostri clienti interni.

## Mansioni
- Organizzazione e pianificazione dei lavori di manutenzione e riparazione degli edifici e degli impianti tecnici
- Gestione delle richieste di intervento e comunicazione con i clienti interni
- Gestione dei processi di acquisto materiale e ordini di lavoro
- Attività di manutenzione, riparazione e altre attività in ambito logistica incluso servizio di picchetto
- Gestione e coordinamento del team di manutenzione

## Requisiti
- Conoscenza della tecnica degli edifici (impianti elettrici, riscaldamento, impianti frigoriferi, impianti sanitari, ventilazione, reti ICT)
- Esperienza (10 anni) nella gestione, manutenzione e riparazione di edifici e impianti tecnici, incluso il servizio di picchetto
- Conoscenza di applicativi per la gestione di ticket e asset (EAM, SAP o simili)
- Buone conoscenze di sistemi di gestione edifici (Siemens, Honeywell o simili)
- Ottima conoscenza degli applicativi Office e best practice nell’utilizzo delle tecnologie (PC, App, ecc.)
- Esperienza nella conduzione di un team e nella gestione di piccoli progetti
- Orientamento verso il cliente (interno) e forte spirito per il lavoro di squadra
- Residente in Ticino
- Diploma AFC in ambito tecnico (edilizia e/o impianti) con preferenza per l’ambito elettrico, elettrotecnico o elettromeccanico. Eventuali formazioni superiori in ambito tecnico costituiscono titolo preferenziale
- Italiano (lingua madre) e buona conoscenza di una seconda lingua nazionale (preferibilmente tedesco). Buone conoscenze dell’inglese

descriptionByLocale.en: ## Description We are looking for a Logistics Services Collaborator for the Technical Office to strengthen our team. In this role, you will be responsible for coordinating and planning maintenance and repair activities for buildings and technical systems, ensuring efficient operations and high-quality service for our internal clients. ## Responsibilities - Organization and planning of maintenance and repair work for buildings and technical systems - Management of intervention requests and communication with internal clients - Management of material purchasing processes and work orders - Maintenance, repair, and other logistics activities including on-call service - Management and coordination of the maintenance team ## Requirements - Knowledge of building technology (electrical systems, heating, refrigeration systems, sanitary systems, ventilation, ICT networks) - Experience (10 years) in the management, maintenance, and repair of buildings and technical systems, including on-call service - Knowledge of applications for ticket and asset management (EAM, SAP, or similar) - Good knowledge of building management systems (Siemens, Honeywell, or similar) - Excellent knowledge of Office applications and best practices in using technologies (PC, Apps, etc.) - Experience in leading a team and managing small projects - Customer-oriented (internal) and strong team spirit - Resident in Ticino - Technical diploma (AFC) in the field (construction and/or systems) with a preference for electrical, electrotechnical, or electromechanical fields. Any higher technical training is an advantage - Italian (native language) and good knowledge of a second national language (preferably German). Good knowledge of English.
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Wir suchen einen Mitarbeiter für Logistikdienste im Technischen Büro, um unser Team zu verstärken. In dieser Rolle sind Sie verantwortlich für die Koordination und Planung von Wartungs- und Reparaturarbeiten an Gebäuden und technischen Anlagen, um effiziente Abläufe und einen hochwertigen Service für unsere internen Kunden zu gewährleisten. ## Aufgaben - Organisation und Planung der Wartungs- und Reparaturarbeiten an Gebäuden und technischen Anlagen - Verwaltung von Interventionsanfragen und Kommunikation mit internen Kunden - Verwaltung der Materialbeschaffungsprozesse und Arbeitsaufträge - Wartungs-, Reparatur- und andere logistische Tätigkeiten einschließlich Bereitschaftsdienst - Management und Koordination des Wartungsteams ## Anforderungen - Kenntnisse der Gebäudetechnik (elektrische Anlagen, Heizung, Kälteanlagen, Sanitäranlagen, Belüftung, ICT-Netzwerke) - Erfahrung (10 Jahre) in der Verwaltung, Wartung und Reparatur von Gebäuden und technischen Anlagen, einschließlich Bereitschaftsdienst - Kenntnisse von Anwendungen zur Verwaltung von Tickets und Assets (EAM, SAP oder ähnlich) - Gute Kenntnisse von Gebäudeleitsystemen (Siemens, Honeywell oder ähnlich) - Ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse der Office-Anwendungen und Best Practices im Umgang mit Technologien (PC, Apps usw.) - Erfahrung in der Führung eines Teams und der Verwaltung kleiner Projekte - Kundenorientierung (intern) und starker Teamgeist - Wohnsitz im Tessin - Technisches Diplom (AFC) im Bereich (Bau und/oder Anlagen) mit Vorliebe für elektrische, elektrotechnische oder mechatronische Bereiche. Höhere technische Ausbildungen sind von Vorteil - Italienisch (Muttersprache) und gute Kenntnisse einer zweiten Landessprache (vorzugsweise Deutsch). Gute Englischkenntnisse.
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Nous recherchons un Collaborateur/une Collaboratrice Services Logistiques pour le Bureau Technique afin de renforcer notre équipe. Dans ce rôle, vous serez responsable de la coordination et de la planification des activités de maintenance et de réparation des bâtiments et des systèmes techniques, garantissant des opérations efficaces et un service de haute qualité pour nos clients internes. ## Missions - Organisation et planification des travaux de maintenance et de réparation des bâtiments et des systèmes techniques - Gestion des demandes d'intervention et communication avec les clients internes - Gestion des processus d'achat de matériel et des ordres de travail - Activités de maintenance, de réparation et d'autres activités logistiques, y compris le service d'astreinte - Gestion et coordination de l'équipe de maintenance ## Exigences - Connaissance de la technique des bâtiments (systèmes électriques, chauffage, systèmes de réfrigération, systèmes sanitaires, ventilation, réseaux ICT) - Expérience (10 ans) dans la gestion, la maintenance et la réparation de bâtiments et de systèmes techniques, y compris le service d'astreinte - Connaissance d'applications pour la gestion de tickets et d'actifs (EAM, SAP ou similaires) - Bonnes connaissances des systèmes de gestion des bâtiments (Siemens, Honeywell ou similaires) - Excellente connaissance des applications Office et des meilleures pratiques dans l'utilisation des technologies (PC, Apps, etc.) - Expérience dans la conduite d'une équipe et la gestion de petits projets - Orientation client (interne) et fort esprit d'équipe - Résident dans le Tessin - Diplôme AFC dans le domaine technique (bâtiment et/ou systèmes) avec préférence pour le domaine électrique, électrotechnique ou électromécanique. Toute formation supérieure dans le domaine technique constitue un atout - Italien (langue maternelle) et bonne connaissance d'une deuxième langue nationale (de préférence allemand). Bonnes connaissances de l'anglais.

unchangedJobs.title: Employee Card Onboarding
unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione
The candidate will be responsible for implementing the payment card issuing process for corporate customers, analysing and evaluating requests, setting spending limits and activating complementary services.

The role involves direct contact with potential customers, including by telephone, in order to gather information, clarify requirements and support the customer throughout the entire process.

## Key responsibilities:
- Answer incoming calls and handling inquiries from customers and business partners in German, French, Italian and English
- Manage payment card issuance requests for corporate customers
- Analyse and evaluate the validity of the request, verifying the customer's profile and consistency with company policies
- Request and verify the necessary documentation (e.g. corporate, financial and identification documents)
- Define the most appropriate spending limit based on customer analysis and risk level
- Enter and configure complementary services associated with the card (e.g. insurance, reporting, digital services, spending controls)
- Contact potential customers by telephone to discuss their requests in detail, provide clarification and commercial support
- Collaborate with internal teams (credit risk, operations) to ensure a smooth and effective process
- Ensure compliance with current regulations and internal procedures (KYC, AML, credit policy)

## What do we offer?
- Flexibility in working from home and the management of working hours in order to guarantee a healthy work-life balance
- Numerous benefits and incentives
- Well-being, motivational and team-building activities

## For the job opening, we are looking for candidates who meet the following requirements:
- Administrative background
- Privious experience in similar position
- Good knowledge of Office package/ PC use
- Languages: Italian / German native proficiency / Basic French / Basic English
- Customer orientation and ability to work in team
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Il candidato sarà responsabile dell'implementazione del processo di emissione delle carte di pagamento per clienti aziendali, analizzando e valutando le richieste, impostando i limiti di spesa e attivando servizi complementari. Il ruolo prevede un contatto diretto con i potenziali clienti, anche telefonicamente, per raccogliere informazioni, chiarire i requisiti e supportare il cliente durante l'intero processo. ## Responsabilità principali: - Rispondere alle chiamate in arrivo e gestire le richieste dei clienti e dei partner commerciali in tedesco, francese, italiano e inglese - Gestire le richieste di emissione di carte di pagamento per clienti aziendali - Analizzare e valutare la validità della richiesta, verificando il profilo del cliente e la coerenza con le politiche aziendali - Richiedere e verificare la documentazione necessaria (ad es. documenti aziendali, finanziari e di identificazione) - Definire il limite di spesa più appropriato in base all'analisi del cliente e al livello di rischio - Inserire e configurare i servizi complementari associati alla carta (ad es. assicurazione, reportistica, servizi digitali, controlli di spesa) - Contattare i potenziali clienti telefonicamente per discutere in dettaglio le loro richieste, fornire chiarimenti e supporto commerciale - Collaborare con i team interni (rischio di credito, operazioni) per garantire un processo fluido ed efficace - Garantire la conformità alle normative vigenti e alle procedure interne (KYC, AML, politica di credito) ## Cosa offriamo? - Flessibilità nel lavoro da casa e nella gestione degli orari di lavoro per garantire un sano equilibrio tra vita lavorativa e vita privata - Numerosi benefici e incentivi - Attività di benessere, motivazione e team building ## Per questa posizione, stiamo cercando candidati che soddisfino i seguenti requisiti: - Esperienza amministrativa - Esperienza precedente in posizione simile - Buona conoscenza del pacchetto Office/uso del PC - Lingue: italiano / tedesco madrelingua / francese di base / inglese di base - Orientamento al cliente e capacità di lavorare in team - Residente in Ticino o disposto a trasferirsi

descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Der Kandidat ist verantwortlich für die Implementierung des Prozesses zur Ausgabe von Zahlungskarten für Unternehmenskunden, analysiert und bewertet Anfragen, legt Ausgabenlimits fest und aktiviert ergänzende Dienstleistungen. Die Rolle umfasst den direkten Kontakt mit potenziellen Kunden, auch telefonisch, um Informationen zu sammeln, Anforderungen zu klären und den Kunden während des gesamten Prozesses zu unterstützen. ## Hauptverantwortlichkeiten: - Entgegennahme eingehender Anrufe und Bearbeitung von Anfragen von Kunden und Geschäftspartnern in Deutsch, Französisch, Italienisch und Englisch - Verwaltung von Anfragen zur Ausgabe von Zahlungskarten für Unternehmenskunden - Analyse und Bewertung der Gültigkeit der Anfrage, Überprüfung des Kundenprofils und der Übereinstimmung mit den Unternehmensrichtlinien - Anfordern und Überprüfen der erforderlichen Dokumentation (z. B. Unternehmens-, Finanz- und Identifikationsdokumente) - Festlegung des angemessensten Ausgabenlimits basierend auf der Kundenanalyse und dem Risikoniveau - Eingabe und Konfiguration von ergänzenden Dienstleistungen, die mit der Karte verbunden sind (z. B. Versicherung, Berichterstattung, digitale Dienstleistungen, Ausgabenüberwachung) - Telefonischer Kontakt mit potenziellen Kunden, um ihre Anfragen im Detail zu besprechen, Klarstellungen zu geben und kommerzielle Unterstützung zu bieten - Zusammenarbeit mit internen Teams (Kreditrisiko, Betrieb), um einen reibungslosen und effektiven Prozess sicherzustellen - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung der geltenden Vorschriften und internen Verfahren (KYC, AML, Kreditrichtlinie) ## Was bieten wir? - Flexibilität beim Arbeiten von zu Hause und bei der Verwaltung der Arbeitszeiten, um ein gesundes Gleichgewicht zwischen Berufs- und Privatleben zu gewährleisten - Zahlreiche Vorteile und Anreize - Aktivitäten zur Förderung des Wohlbefindens, Motivation und Teambildung ## Für diese Stellenanzeige suchen wir Kandidaten, die die folgenden Anforderungen erfüllen: - Administrative Erfahrung - Frühere Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Position - Gute Kenntnisse des Office-Pakets/PC-Nutzung - Sprachen: Italienisch / Deutsch als Muttersprache / Grundkenntnisse in Französisch / Grundkenntnisse in Englisch - Kundenorientierung und Teamfähigkeit - Wohnhaft im Tessin oder bereit, umzuziehen
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Le candidat sera responsable de la mise en œuvre du processus d'émission de cartes de paiement pour les clients professionnels, en analysant et en évaluant les demandes, en fixant des limites de dépenses et en activant des services complémentaires. Le rôle implique un contact direct avec des clients potentiels, y compris par téléphone, afin de recueillir des informations, de clarifier les exigences et de soutenir le client tout au long du processus. ## Responsabilités clés : - Répondre aux appels entrants et gérer les demandes des clients et des partenaires commerciaux en allemand, français, italien et anglais - Gérer les demandes d'émission de cartes de paiement pour les clients professionnels - Analyser et évaluer la validité de la demande, en vérifiant le profil du client et la cohérence avec les politiques de l'entreprise - Demander et vérifier la documentation nécessaire (par exemple, documents d'entreprise, financiers et d'identification) - Définir la limite de dépenses la plus appropriée en fonction de l'analyse du client et du niveau de risque - Saisir et configurer les services complémentaires associés à la carte (par exemple, assurance, reporting, services numériques, contrôles de dépenses) - Contacter les clients potentiels par téléphone pour discuter en détail de leurs demandes, fournir des clarifications et un soutien commercial - Collaborer avec les équipes internes (risque de crédit, opérations) pour garantir un processus fluide et efficace - Assurer la conformité avec les réglementations en vigueur et les procédures internes (KYC, AML, politique de crédit) ## Que proposons-nous ? - Flexibilité pour travailler à domicile et gérer les horaires de travail afin de garantir un équilibre sain entre vie professionnelle et vie privée - De nombreux avantages et incitations - Activités de bien-être, de motivation et de renforcement d'équipe ## Pour cette offre d'emploi, nous recherchons des candidats répondant aux exigences suivantes : - Expérience administrative - Expérience préalable dans un poste similaire - Bonne connaissance du pack Office/utilisation de l'ordinateur - Langues : italien / allemand langue maternelle / français de base / anglais de base - Orientation client et capacité à travailler en équipe - Résident dans le Tessin ou prêt à déménager

unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione
The selected candidate will be responsible for managing risks related to Asset Liability Management (ALM) and liquidity risk, ensuring that the company maintains a solid financial position and can navigate market challenges effectively.

## Mansioni
- Conduct in-depth analysis of risks related to ALM and liquidity risk, identifying potential vulnerabilities and developing mitigation strategies
- Monitor the company's daily liquidity position, ensuring compliance with regulatory and internal requirements in alignment with Basel framework and FINMA ordinance
- Collaborate with treasury and finance departments to optimize liquidity management practices, including cash flow forecasting, liquidity buffer management and funding strategies/ contingency plan
- Assess and manage the company's exposure to interest rate risk in the banking book (IRRBB), developing strategies to mitigate adverse impacts on earnings and capital
- Conduct liquidity stress testing and scenario analysis to evaluate the impact of adverse market conditions on the company’s liquidity position
- Prepare detailed and accurate reports on liquidity risk and ALM for senior management, Committee, Regulators, providing clear analysis and recommendations
- Ability to work under pressure in a dynamic environment setting priorities and meet tiny deadlines

## Requisiti
- Advanced knowledge of ALM and liquidity risk, interest rate risk management tools and methodologies, including scenario analysis and stress testing
- Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail, with the ability to interpret and synthesize large volumes of complex data using programming knowledge (Phyton, R, SQL)
- Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present technical information clearly and concisely to non-technical stakeholders
- At least 5 years of experience in risk management, with a particular focus on ALM/ liquidity risk or treasury department
- Italian / English native proficiency / French / German is a plus
- Professional certification in risk management (e.g., FRM, PRM) is a plus
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

unchangedJobs.title: Compliance Officer Senior
unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione
We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Compliance professional to join our team. The ideal candidate will have solid experience in regulatory matters, particularly in AML, cross-border activities and sanctions, and will be able to provide clear guidance and practical solutions to the business. This role requires strong analytical skills, sound judgment, and the ability to manage complex cases in a dynamic and evolving regulatory environment. The candidate will play a key role in ensuring adherence to applicable regulations, supporting business initiatives, and contributing to the ongoing development of the Compliance framework.

## Mansioni
- Analysis, review and handling of cases related to AML, cross-border activities and sanctions, including the preparation of assessments and formal positions for the business  
- Opportunity to analyze cases related to market abuse and product suitability, as well as FATCA and CRS matter  
- Definition of Compliance requirements and supervision of their implementation within projects aimed at developing new products or services  
- Drafting and review of internal policies and procedures in the Compliance area (e.g. AML, cross-border and sanctions)  
- Collection of data and information for Compliance reporting addressed to senior management, as well as for periodic Compliance risk assessments  
- Preparation and delivery of Compliance training  
- Monitoring of regulatory developments in the Compliance area and analysis of their impact  
- Handling requests from External and Internal Audit  
- Execution of consolidated supervision activities in the Compliance area  
- Ability to interact effectively with colleagues from different departments (e.g. Business, Operations, IT)  
- Apply a critical and proactive approach in identifying new solutions  
- Work independently  
- Manage a high volume of cases efficiently  

## Requisiti
- At least 5 years of experience in the banking sector in a similar role (Compliance Officer), preferably not limited to AML but also covering broader regulatory Compliance and advisory activities (cross-border, sanctions, reporting, Compliance risk assessment, consolidated supervision), as well as experience in overseeing Compliance-related projects  
- Experience in Compliance related to market conduct (e.g. monitoring of market abuse, product suitability reviews, etc.) is considered a strong asset  
- Experience in Compliance related to FATCA and CRS is considered a plus  
- Languages: Italian / English native proficiency / French / German is a plus.  
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

Il candidato ideale avrà una solida esperienza in materia normativa, in particolare in AML, attività transfrontaliere e sanzioni, e sarà in grado di fornire indicazioni chiare e soluzioni pratiche per il business. Questo ruolo richiede forti capacità analitiche, buon giudizio e la capacità di gestire casi complessi in un ambiente normativo dinamico ed in evoluzione.
